defect: charged to "beer-can cold" instead of subcool/superheat targets
prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is Charging & diagnostics, part of the HVAC-R scope. The observed field condition is: charged to "beer-can cold" instead of subcool/superheat targets. The work is in service as an operating asset. Reference material on hand: mfr charging charts.
title: Fault diagnosis: Charging & diagnostics (service call)
